name: regularity + higher-order Fourier + transference
signature: a dense/relative object; a decomposition into structured + pseudorandom parts; a counting/transference step that finds patterns in the structured part

name: logarithmically-averaged multiplicative functions (Elliott/Chowla)
signature: a bounded multiplicative or ±1 sequence; a correlation to control; an entropy-decrement / averaged-Elliott step

name: the polynomial method
signature: a combinatorial extremal question; a polynomial vanishing on or interpolating a structured set; a rank/degree bound (slice rank, polynomial partitioning) limiting the configuration

name: Ramsey-type forcing (pigeonhole at scale)
signature: a large enough structure; a finite palette of local configurations; a guarantee that size forces a prescribed ordered/monochromatic substructure

name: the probabilistic method
signature: an object to show exists/bound; a random construction; a positive-probability / concentration argument

name: Fourier analysis / circle method
signature: a counting problem over the integers or a finite group; a Fourier transform; a density-increment or uniformity argument

name: extremal set theory
signature: a family of finite sets; an intersection / spread / covering condition; an extremal bound on the family's size

name: combinatorial geometry of distances
signature: points in the plane; a distance / incidence / coloring question; a combinatorial extremal bound
